artifacts.role: policy guard for WordPress-profile adapter template contents
manifest recording template placeholder contracts and php -l results

claims: The current compiler-owned WordPress adapter template set is empty.
Any future compiler-owned WordPress adapter template must use only valid {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens.
Any future template placeholder set must match the static renderTemplate replacement metadata and lint after deterministic rendering.
non_claims: This does not claim future adapter templates are forbidden when backed by a Beads task, provenance, and parity gates.
This does not claim additional WordPress runtime behavior parity.
